title: Pneumatopteris petrophila
taxonomy: Pneumatopteris petrophila is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification places it within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that produce spores. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large and diverse group of ferns, with many species found in tropical and subtropical regions. Pneumatopteris petrophila is specifically known for its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native habitat. The classification of Pneumatopteris petrophila reflects its evolutionary history and relationships with other ferns.
